description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named artifacts that runs on push to master branch or tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a job for Windows with a matrix strategy for x64 and x86 architectures. It checks out the code, sets up vcpkg and NuGet, configures and builds a project using CMake, packages it, uploads the artifact, extracts the version number, and creates a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
